5:05 MSK 2013 redrat@host.redrat.ru:/arc/obj/arc/src/sys/HOST amd64
>Description:
A little patch updating textproc/rubygem-sass port to the latest version of SASS.
>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:

--- Makefile.orig	2013-02-24 23:46:12.000000000 +0400
+++ Makefile	2013-05-13 16:11:37.000000000 +0400
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/textproc/rubygem-sass/Makefile,v 1.17 2013/02/24 19:46:12 svnexp Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	sass
-PORTVERSION=	3.2.6
+PORTVERSION=	3.2.9
 CATEGORIES=	textproc ruby
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
--- distinfo.orig	2013-02-24 23:46:13.000000000 +0400
+++ distinfo	2013-05-13 16:13:51.000000000 +0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/sass-3.2.6.gem) = 48e0fb77ae1dd661913fe9dafdb94438ebb6ae7260481610ca298d61cc34be83
-SIZE (rubygem/sass-3.2.6.gem) = 258560
+SHA256 (rubygem/sass-3.2.9.gem) = f88433638d8dcf31366e55451087e04fb1aecc29c554f240647baba8495c9b22
+SIZE (rubygem/sass-3.2.9.gem) = 259584
